payload.answer: I can’t tell who “he” refers to or what “the other one” means. Please clarify before I save anything.
repair_options: Clarify the person: who does “he” refer to?
Clarify the preference target: what are the options, and which is “the other one”?
Provide the full fact in a self-contained form, e.g., “[Person] prefers [specific option] over [other option].”
